subject: feat(export): add timestamps to filenames, page numbers for multi-page
body:
Timestamps (MMdd-HHmm) in all export filenames solve two issues:
- Files sort chronologically in the downloads folder
- No more browser "already exists" prompts on repeated downloads

Page numbers added contextually:
- Single download: -p01 suffix only when document has multiple pages
- All-pages ZIP: files inside use -p01, -p02 etc.
- PDF and multi-platform ZIP: unchanged (already distinguish by content)

Example: canvagrid-0306-1423-instagram-feed-portrait-1080x1350-p01.png

Tags: export, filenames, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: export
Semver: minor
